alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google in Devices and Services with two promotions; experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs
alignments.job_requirement: Partner Excellence Manager role in Professional Services at fast-growing SaaS (Pigment, 600+ team, $400M raised)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations and Business Transformation focus; experience with product ownership, requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and transformation
alignments.job_requirement: Pigment is an AI-powered business planning platform; role sits in Professional Services

gaps.gap: Role title 'Partner Excellence Manager' suggests customer-facing partner success or account-management scope, not strategic operations or transformation leadership
gaps.mitigation: Request full JD to clarify partner-management, strategic advisory, or implementation leadership scope; if strategic transformation or deployment-strategy elements exist, gap severity may lower

gaps.gap: Professional Services context (partner delivery, customer success, account management) is typically in the deprioritized-unless-clear-strategic-scope bucket
gaps.mitigation: Confirm whether role includes cross-functional strategy, business transformation, or process-design scope beyond partner satisfaction or account health

gaps.gap: JD text does not specify role responsibilities, reporting line, team scope, or partner-management domain (implementation, training, account success, strategic advisory)
gaps.mitigation: Full job description is essential to assess seniority, strategic fit, and whether this is a partner-satisfaction/success role or a strategic implementation-leadership role

output.level_rationale: Estimated L4 based on Professional Services Manager context at a 600+ SaaS company; title and department alone suggest middle-management or senior IC scope, but absence of detailed JD responsibilities, team size, reporting level, and strategic mandate lowers confidence significantly. Partner Excellence Manager is inherently ambiguous without scope detail.
output.summary: Role title and Professional Services context strongly suggest customer-success or partner-account-management scope, which falls outside the candidate's target Strategy and Operations families unless the full JD demonstrates strategic transformation, deployment-strategy, or cross-functional business-problem-solving responsibilities. Candidate positioning is Strategy and Operations leader; this role appears to be customer/partner-success-oriented. Critical: the provided Role JSON contains only company background and location; no role responsibilities, reporting line, team scope, or partner-management mandate are specified. Recommend requesting full JD before proceeding.
uncertainties: No role responsibilities, success metrics, or partner-management domain specified in Role JSON
Ambiguous whether 'Partner Excellence' is account-management, customer-success, implementation-leadership, or strategic-advisory in nature
No reporting line, team size, or strategic mandate stated
Unclear whether Pigment's Professional Services org has transformation or strategic deployment scope
